cost_overrun_reason: mamba-ssm/causal-conv1d build failed (CUDA 12.4 vs torch 13.0 mismatch on first install attempt) + tokenizer pad_token fix-up restart; ~7 min wasted on infra. Sweep itself was 24s (well within est).

measurement.ablation_target: whole_layer_passthrough (v3 MLP-only fallback to whole-layer because no MLP submodule)

decision_matrix_cell_hit: rows-5-to-8 (falcon_mamba_decoupling=false). Final cell of 8 awaits yi+qwen25 dispatches. Possible cells: HFD-B SUB_AXIS (Llama-derivatives-only), HFD-B narrow (Llama-arch-only), HFD-B alt (Qwen2-only), HFD-C ARTIFACT confirmed.
preliminary_directional_signal: SSM-no-attention does NOT preserve axis 96 family decoupling. All 4 family axes peak at the final 3 layers (61-63/64) with mean pairwise Pearson=0.77 — strongly coupled trace, low peak-spread (0.031 << 0.15 threshold). Saturation_frac=0 confirms measurement is NOT degenerate (whole-layer passthrough produces non-trivial dy at every layer). Result rules out HFD-A (cross-paradigm LIVING_AXIS) and increases posterior on HFD-B (Llama-arch-confined) or HFD-C (artifact).
raw10_caveats: SSM-no-attention: Falcon-mamba lacks transformer attention; CMT family axes evolved/calibrated on attention-bearing transformers may not directly probe the same compute primitives. The COUPLED verdict could reflect 'CMT axes are attention-localized, not arch-universal' rather than 'axis 96 is artifact'.

MLP-fallback-to-whole-layer NOT module-equivalent: anima_cmt v3 default targets MLP+residual-passthrough on transformers; Falcon-mamba SSM has no MLP submodule so the wrapper ablated whole-layer (mixer block) with residual preserved. This is 'block-level no-op equivalent' but ablates ~2x the compute (mixer ≈ attn+MLP combined) — measurement scope differs from transformer MLP-only.
Single-bb-no-replication: n=1 SSM backbone tested; cannot generalize across SSM family. Mamba-7B / Mamba2 / RWKV / RetNet untested. The COUPLED verdict is suggestive, not conclusive for SSM-class.

BBA-n=4-axes-weak: 4-family decoupling matrix yields 6 pairwise Pearson scalars — wide CIs (~0.15+). The bba_decoupling_score=0.23 sits between the COUPLED threshold (<0.15) and DECOUPLED (>0.30); peak_spread_norm=0.031 is the more decisive signal.

Tokenizer-mismatch-confound: Falcon-mamba uses Falcon tokenizer (different vocab/BPE merges than Llama family). Prompt token-ids differ; absolute scale of dy may shift independent of arch. Pearson correlation across layers is tokenizer-invariant by construction (per-prompt baseline) but absolute thresholds may not transfer.
verdict_caveats: 8-cell decision matrix requires all 3 dispatches; this verdict is partial (mamba arm filled; yi+qwen25 pending).
v3-default ablation on SSM is not directly comparable to v3-default ablation on transformers — re-pre-register required if module-equivalent comparison desired.

$0.18 budget overrun to $0.59 (3.28x) due to mamba-ssm CUDA build failure on first install + pad_token fix restart. Future SSM dispatches: skip mamba-ssm install, use HF native fallback (sequential SSM, ~24s sweep on H100).
Sequential SSM forward path (no mamba-ssm fast kernels) — slower per-token but otherwise equivalent for ablation comparison.
Pod terminated cleanly post-result (verified: pod_get returns 404).
pre_register_status_after: FROZEN (no matrix change; verdict cell falls within row5-8 region)
